name: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc.
summary: PART I Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (the Company), is a real estate finance company, formed as a Maryland corporation, that has elected to be treated as a real estate investment trust (REIT) for U.S. federal income tax purposes since 2013. Substantially all of the Companys business is conducted through FBRT OP LLC, a Delaware limited liability company (the OP) and to its subsidiaries.
